name: Sara Pascoe
blurb: Her confessional, ideas-driven solo shows include Sara Pascoe Vs History, which was nominated for the Edinburgh Comedy Award in 2014, and LadsLadsLads.
bio: Sara Pascoe is an English comedian, actress and writer from Dagenham, east London, who began stand-up in 2007 and became a regular on panel shows such as QI and 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown. Her confessional, ideas-driven solo shows include Sara Pascoe Vs History, which was nominated for the Edinburgh Comedy Award in 2014, and LadsLadsLads. She is also a published author and has hosted The Great British Sewing Bee.

timeline.ev: Edinburgh Fringe debut, Sara Pascoe Vs Her Ego
Sara Pascoe Vs History; wins Chortle Breakthrough Award
LadsLadsLads recorded at the London Palladium for BBC Two

accolades: Edinburgh Comedy Award Best Show nomination, Sara Pascoe Vs History (2014)
